name: Okta: Privileged Users with Old Passwords (Indirect)
description: Finds users whose last password change was more than a year ago and hold privileged role assignments through group membership.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_MemberOf]->(:Okta_Group)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.passwordChanged IS NOT NULL AND datetime(u.passwordChanged) <= datetime() - duration("P365D")
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
